reviews.review_title: I like but, not enough steps
reviews.review_description:
I like the app, you can learn.
But there are not enough steps to accomplish a song.
Only have basic steps. Lateral steps, and a basic turn around.
With these 3 steps if you dancing with someone real, will be bored soon dancing with you.
Please put more steps to finish a full song.
Sequence of steps together. 
Combining types of turns around.

Thanks in advance. Congratulations for your current work.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the praise! We’re working hard to add more steps and combinations.

Our initial goal was to teach the proper technique and timing of beginner salsa steps and how to combine them, so you can feel comfortable dancing with a real partner or taking in-person classes. By popular demand, we’ve since added longer sequences (Challenges) with music from a leading artist.

It’s extremely encouraging for us to hear that the app helped you learn and that you’re already ready for more. Rest assured, more steps, choreos, and songs are coming. 🕺💃

reviews.review_description: I wanted to love this. The instructions and instructors are great, interface is good. But tracking is too inconsistent to be effective. I was holding my arms weird just to hold the partners hand, and I watched randomly let go, and the system would register that I let go. I assumed it was me, but I realized I was paying more attention to the hands than dancing. And you are rolled back to a slower beat - that works at first but is counterproductive to improvement. I would prefer user input on whether we slow down. Or a more intuitive way to restart the lesson at the very least.

developer_response.body:
Hi DraculaLVR, we’re sorry that the partner was letting go of your hands, that this distracted you from dancing properly, and that it caused you to hold your arms at a weird angle.

You may have noticed that the partner lets go when your hands are too far from its hands, or if they’re facing the wrong way (up/down). However, you can mostly ignore brief hand disconnections. To earn a star and move to the faster speed, it’s more important to stay on the beat (as a lead) or follow the partner (as a follow), without anticipating or lagging behind. This helps keep your torsos aligned and avoids twisting your arms.

We’d love to help sort this out. If you don’t mind joining our Discord community, we can better understand what’s happening in your case.

For now, if you’re still unable to get the stars, you’ll have a chance to dance faster in the “at home” lesson that follows, and even faster in the Challenges you'll unlock. You can also restart using the “menu” gesture (left-hand palm facing you, then pinch your index finger and thumb).

Cheers, and thank you for the feedback!

reviews.review_title: I need a refund! HOW DO I GET ONE? Help!
reviews.review_description: I bought this literally about 15 minutes ago. The steps were super basic and not only that but it got stuck when my first solo lesson was supposed to start so I followed along to the 123-4567 steps but when it came time for me to do it. There’s a bar that says continue and I would click it and click it and click it and nothing would happen so I got out. I went back in. I got out. I went back in and it was always the same thing I cannot get past to do anything so I just want a refund. I am too angry to deal with this again.

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry you had this experience, especially right after purchasing. We identified and fixed an issue where in some cases the pointer rays were shown incorrectly, which could explain why pressing Continue didn’t work.

The fix is now live in the latest version.

If you’d like to give it another try, please update the app and relaunch it. If the issue continues, we’d be happy to help troubleshoot with you on our Discord.

If you’d rather request a refund, refunds are handled directly through the Meta Horizon Store according to their refund policy.

reviews.review_description: Sooo useful! Well done guys, looking forward to future updates:)
When are you going to release more advanced steps, I'm tired of the same thing.

For an early-access title, this is great!

I’m a novice at best. On Day 1 I felt I was making real progress. Day 2 was a setback—my scores were consistently low—and on Day 3 it took a lot of trial and error before my feedback finally surpassed Day 1.

The issue on Days 2 and 3 was that I had only three numeric gauges and no indication of what to adjust. Were my hands too high or low? Did they travel too far? Was I leaning? A clearer feedback system would help. One idea: let us replay our performance with our head and hand positions overlaid on the blue model’s expected movements. That visual comparison would make it obvious which parts of our motion need correction.

As a lower priority, it would be nice to choose more lifelike avatars as dance partners. The blue avatar works well during lessons—it’s unobtrusive and keeps the focus on the instructors and on-screen cues—but when you’re practicing solo, dancing with a more realistic partner would feel less odd.

developer_response.body:
We're very happy that you liked our classes!

Sorry to hear that the feedback wasn't clear. Your hand positioning was most likely just fine. Otherwise the partner would have let go and you would have seen a message under "Connection". To improve your other scores, focus on leading/following with the body/torso, and on your steps i.e weight shifts and matching the instructor’s timing.

Thanks for sharing your idea about replays. Very clever! And about realistic partners. We will look into both.

We’d love for you to join our Discord so we can hear more about your experience and improve the feedback messages.

Cheers!

reviews.review_description: We love it, plz keep up the good qork and give us more advanve spinns and other fun things! ♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡

reviews.review_title: So nice for VR Salsa neofits
reviews.review_description:
Great to have very clear step-by-step onboarding 
Noise! :)

I’m an experienced Salsa dancer so I was looking forward to trying this app out. I love the energy and personality of the instructors and the realism of the dance studio.

For an early release, this application is working well compared to other apps I’ve tested. I feel like when I was just starting out with learning Salsa, the instructors humor and encouragement put you at ease and make the session fun. 

Recommend looking down to ensure your feet are aligned with the foot print images on the virtual floor. 

Keep up the good work and will share more findings in the Discord.

developer_response.body: Hi there, Thank you for the praise! :) Are you seeing a percentage displayed on the fourth lesson? If so, that is the download progress (not a completion percentage). You will be able to start the lesson once it is fully downloaded. If you are still having trouble, would you mind joining our Discord to help us troubleshoot?

reviews.review_description: This is exactly what I wanted, to be able to learn the basic steps before I went to live classes. The Teachers are great and they guy is hilarious  - Great Energy! My only problem is that, when I get to partnered turning practice (right after the teaching portion) I end up in an empty studio. The app stops and doesn't go on from there. Any suggestions?

developer_response.body:
Update: This is fixed in version 0.1.43. Thanks for your help troubleshooting!

Hi there! It's great to hear that you love the app and that you enjoyed Rodrigo and Asya's energy :)   We're sorry you couldn't start the turns practice. We tried but are not able to reproduce the issue. Would you mind joining our Discord to help us troubleshoot?

reviews.review_title: Great idea but too short for the price
reviews.review_description:
Everything in the app is a good idea, however I feel quite unsatisfied. I paid the price of 2 hours of public salsa lessons and did not reach the point where 2 hours of lessons led me.

I loved the virtual partner idea, but when it comes to turns (last lessons) the partner acts weird and shaky.

Overall it's a good idea but I would expect much more content for the price.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your feedback! We're happy to hear that you enjoyed the concept of the app and especially the virtual partner feature. We understand that you’re looking for more content to match the value of in-person lessons, and we truly appreciate your input on this.

We're constantly working to improve the experience, including refining the virtual partner's movements, and adding more content. Stay tuned for upcoming updates, which will include new content and enhancements to ensure the app delivers even more value. 

In the meantime, keep practicing with our practice lessons at home or on the beach and keep dancing!

reviews.review_description: I love this app.  The instructors are amazing, the practices are very helpful, & the steps are quick & easy to pick up with practice.  I can't wait until more content is added!!

reviews.review_title: A great idea, well executed. Great team.
reviews.review_description:
Usually the best ideas for VR seem so obvious in hindsight, but takes someone to actually figure out how to do it. Salsa Academy is a fantastic idea. Especially as a man who would have no confidence going to learn salsa in a public setting, this is a great way to build that confidence. The lessons are clear and well performed. The measurement of your tempo in following the steps is creepily accurate. 
I met the team responsible at GamesCom and they were honestly the nicest people who really care about Salsa and their project. If you have ever wanted to learn don't hesitate to pick this up!

I love this app! This is such a great way to use the technology. The instructors are knowledgeable and friendly, and the partner system works surprisingly well! A great way to be introduced to Salsa and dance and build up some confidence before hitting the dance floor or attending a class. Hope to see more dance styles added in the future!
Enjoyed a lot learning salsa dance steps! The instructors were super charming, like if salsa were two people that's how they would be.

I love the concept, it works flawlessly! There is one bug that can be fixed by turning off the experimental setting "use apps while lying down": The app loses your positioning when you leave the boundary. (thanks for the discord support to reproduce this issue!). 
I really really really hope that there is more content to come! in the meantime, I would love to dance at the beach, switching between combos without interruption (announcement message boxes for the next steps are unnecessary; we whave the rolling text in the background), for at least a few minutes :) KEEP IT COMING, PLEASE!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your detailed feedback! We’re glad you’re enjoying the app.

We are looking into the recentering issue you are experiencing. Would you mind joining our Discord to help us troubleshoot? We have several questions.

As a workaround, you can recenter the playspace without controllers using the right hand system gesture (rotate your hand to face your palm, then pinch your thumb and index fingers for few seconds).

We’re working on adding more content and improving the flow between combos—thanks for the suggestion!  Stay tuned for updates and keep dancing!

reviews.review_title: Immersive & fun. Best way to learn salsa
reviews.review_description:
Wow, I recently tried this app to learn salsa and I just have to say how great it is! If you’ve ever wanted to learn salsa, this is the way to do it.

You put on the headset and suddenly you’re in this super realistic dance studio. You can chose to follow or lead. The instructors are amazing—so friendly and engaging, it feels like they’re right there with you.

I love how the lessons are paced just right, so you never feel lost or bored. There’s always something new to learn, from structured lessons to practice sessions and fun challenges.

My absolute favorite part is the virtual partner. It’s seriously mind-blowing how real it feels dancing with the virtual partner. Not only it's great practice, I think it also helps getting used to the idea of dancing with a real partner in the future.

There are a couple of minor things that could be improved, but overall this app is just fantastic. It takes you from a total newbie to mastering some pretty impressive moves. Plus, you can go at your own pace, which is awesome.

If you want to learn salsa, you’ve got to try this. Highly recommended!
I have taken salsa lessons in the last 6 months. This was way better!!it was soo fun, official. I actually had to go put my salsa shoes on! Can’t wait to do more lessons tomorrow!

reviews.review_title: Learn how to dance in 5 mins 😍
reviews.review_description: Check out the cool teachers 🤤

When I wanted to learn to dance, I was alone and had only YouTube. This changes with Salsa Academy. I loved to dance with a virtual partner, it felt so real! The instructors were fun and explained everything well. This might really change real-life classes. I hope to see more dances from you to learn even more.

developer_response.body: We're so glad to hear that we could help in making the learning experience better for you. Thank you for your feedback and keep dancing.

reviews.review_description:
The New Salsa Academy isn’t just your average youtube dance tutorial; it’s a dynamic learning app where you get feedback on your moves, can dance with an AI partner, and super charismatic instructors Rodrigo and Asya. 

I can officially say I am now more confident to go out and dance salsa. PS. I love the studio to dance in.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your enthusiastic review. We are glad that Rodrigo and Asya's charisma shines through – they're passionate about helping everyone learn salsa. Keep enjoying your salsa journey!

reviews.review_title: Great idea, finally I can do some moves
reviews.review_description: I hope the developers keep adding content in the near future,  this has a lot of potential. To keep growing I will give it 5 stars. Please add a loop that way I don't have to keep starting over every 2 minutes, I wish that would have been there from the start, To keep the word spreading more things need to be added

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the 5 stars, support from you really helps us! We are working on adding longer practices, so stay tuned, and keep dancing 💃

reviews.review_description: This app is FUN, EASY, ,Interactive . You will learn Salsa. Highly recommend it!  worth the money!

developer_response.body: We're very happy you liked it :) stay tuned for more content.

reviews.review_description:
This is a brilliant idea of utilizing the immersion of VR's fundamentals.
I have taken part in entry level dance lessons before and the experience was very similar, only with less awkwardness, since I had a sense of privacy. On the other hand, comparing the experience to doing this over a youtube video, this was much more immersive, not to mention the actual tracking, that overall gave pretty accurate feedback.
I was also especially impressed by the holographic visuals. The editing of the instructors was extremely well done.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your experience with us. Your points about less awkwardness and privacy are exactly what we aim to tackle and eventually to make you feel confident enough to get out there and dance. We can't wait to hear about you putting your moves to use socially as well. Keep dancing!

reviews.review_description: You can practice any step for as long as you want with a virtual partner after watching the instructions. It is very responsive and gives me confidence to try them in real life.

developer_response.body: We're delighted to hear that The New Salsa Academy is helping you build confidence in your salsa skills – it's exactly what we aimed for. We're excited to see how your skills progress. Keep Dancing!

reviews.review_description: The New Salsa Academy was a delight! Great instructors with lots of charisma and energy, that really got me into the lessons. Looking forward to more advanced moves!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your wonderful feedback. Rest assured, we're working on incorporating more moves into our course. Your eagerness motivates us to keep expanding our content. 
Happy dancing to you.

reviews.review_description:
The new Salsa academy allows all players to experiment or get involved in learning or practicing a very famous and fabulous dance style: Salsa, a very empathetic dance style in direct contact with your partner, allows you to learning the simplest steps from the basics and the possibility of being able to rely on very charismatic and skilled instructors allows you to experience a lesson in total serenity and without judgment on your own abilities, thus allowing you to overcome the fear of learning a new style in public of dance starting from 0 and doing it in total autonomy at home.

The reproduction of the ballroom is very faithful to the classic ones where these dance courses are held, I appreciated the decorations and the general appearance, I suggest further locations in order to give variety and uniqueness during the learning phase through lessons and individual practice or as a couple to find out to what extent you have learned.

The application allows you to experience a unique approach with your partner through interaction in direct contact with a shape that represents him/her and that moves based on who is who, this has proven to be satisfactory on both sides and allows you to guide/be guided with a very high degree of intuitiveness and reality, although I would have preferred human people with facial expressions for the sake of completeness and greater immersion.

The lack of music is felt during the practice phase although the various audio tracks are present in reference to the steps and which help to follow the rhythm, I suggest a future implementation to improve the learning phase and experience stronger emotions during the phase of dance.

The game interface is quite intuitive and interactive for the player, in fact the interactions with the partner and the fluidity of the movements are recorded to the millimeter by the game system and this allows receiving very specific objective evaluations, in conclusion this is an excellent application for learn.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your detailed and encouraging feedback.We love the recommendation of a human-like partner and is definitely something we will go back and explore. As per your suggestion we have unveiled a new location - a tropical beach venue under the stars, along with fun salsa music in every practice and many more cool features. We would love for you to try out the latest version and tell us what you think. Don't forget to keep dancing.
